FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f04cdb7b920>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T15:55:44Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T15:54:22Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T15:55:44Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T15:54:22Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/11 15:57:13.070304403 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070310685 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070336826 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070337630 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070364996 {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070365985 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070379938 new <- list()
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070380718 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070391567 new$width <- width
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070392343 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070405077 new$height <- height
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070405823 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070432906 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070433835 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070445710 new$title <- title
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070446481 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070457426 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070458110 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070470175 new$version <- version
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070471012 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070482490 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070483252 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070494681 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070495424 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070507566 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070508388 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070520914 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070521882 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070533716 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070538722 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070554779 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070555625 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070580804 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070581534 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070594279 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070594964 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070605426 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070606241 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070619011 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070619878 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070633117 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070633905 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070650114 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070650985 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070670101 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070670802 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070685123 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070685919 "default"))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070699643 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070700364 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070713127 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070713960 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070726503 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070727295 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070738878 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070739670 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070754048 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070754866 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070766513 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070767277 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070775201 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070785624 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070786528 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070800794 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070801543 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070811991 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070812663 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070822211 old$family <- family
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070822952 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070832440 version <- old$version
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070833147 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070845622 "2.0")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070846308 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070854332 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070864556 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070865309 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070877298 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070878021 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070897397 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070900808 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070915709 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070916696 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070946007 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070946837 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070986169 invisible()
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070986850 }

2026/05/11 15:57:13.070304403 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070310685 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070336826 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070337630 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070364996 {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070365985 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070379938 new <- list()
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070380718 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070391567 new$width <- width
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070392343 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070405077 new$height <- height
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070405823 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070432906 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070433835 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070445710 new$title <- title
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070446481 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070457426 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070458110 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070470175 new$version <- version
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070471012 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070482490 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070483252 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070494681 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070495424 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070507566 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070508388 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070520914 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070521882 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070533716 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070538722 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070554779 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070555625 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070580804 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070581534 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070594279 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070594964 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070605426 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070606241 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070619011 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070619878 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070633117 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070633905 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070650114 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070650985 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070670101 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070670802 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070685123 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070685919 "default"))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070699643 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070700364 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070713127 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070713960 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070726503 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070727295 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070738878 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070739670 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070754048 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070754866 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070766513 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070767277 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070775201 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070785624 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070786528 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070800794 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070801543 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070811991 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070812663 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070822211 old$family <- family
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070822952 }
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070832440 version <- old$version
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070833147 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070845622 "2.0")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070846308 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070854332 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070864556 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070865309 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070877298 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070878021 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070897397 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070900808 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070915709 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070916696 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070946007 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070946837 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070986169 invisible()
2026/05/11 15:57:13.070986850 }
